cells.rationale: A subtle correctness invariant — the armed latch must engage four readers and edge-suppression without wedging armed-forever, and the spec warns of unlisted state.armed consumers — is a nameable intelligence-bound opus reason, but the blast radius is contained to await.ts logic so high fits over xhigh.

Owner-fenced authorization plus a cancel-vs-fire at-most-once concurrency invariant across a contract-touching multi-file cascade (RPC allowlist, event payload, producer fence, fold replay) is a hard security/correctness opus gate at the contract-shaped xhigh band.
